publicSideBand: Utility-managed company-owned work is covered as part of Missouri American Water's replacement program
privateSideBand: Verified lead or galvanized customer-owned service lines are replaced at no direct charge under the current program
fullReplacementBand: Full replacement is described as no direct charge when the service line is verified as lead or galvanized and scheduled with Missouri American Water
housingTypeAssumption: Missouri American Water publishes explicit no-direct-cost replacement language instead of contractor bid ranges
permitAssumption: Eligibility depends on self-report or inspection confirming lead or galvanized material and utility scheduling
restorationAssumption: The utility coordinates inspections and replacement work through its program rather than owner-managed contractor bids
methodologySummary: Missouri American Water publishes a utility-specific FAQ and program path that ties no-direct-cost replacement to verified lead or galvanized service material rather than a generic statewide estimate.
ownerTriggerSummary: Owners avoid private-side cost only after the utility verifies lead or galvanized material through self-report or inspection and places the address into the current Missouri American Water replacement workflow.
